title: Watch: Trump says there is possibility US could restart strikes on Iran
SRH vs KKR Playing 11, IPL 2026 Today Match: Will Matheesha Pathirana get a look in for Kolkata vs Hyderabad?
Silence, the court is in session
description: The resignation of Allahabad High Court judge Yashwant Varma last month, amid parliamentary proceedings to remove him over allegations that burnt wads of unaccounted cash were found at his Delhi residence in 2025, has brought into focus how the judiciary holds itself to account. Aaratrika Bhaumik reports on the opacity surrounding complaints against judges, the routine rejection of information requests, and the shrinking space for criticism

title: NGO fronts, remote access: Inside Rs 14.85-crore digital arrest
Dhurandhar actor R Madhavan says son Vedant is frugal, ‘doesn’t want a house or car’: ‘His wisdom different from mine’
Over 1,000 kg of suspect paneer destroyed in April in Gujarat
Tribals, Scheduled Castes preserved India's identity and soul despite foreign invasions: Bhagwat
description: "This is the society's enduring ethos, which has survived for thousands of years. For various reasons, partly because of our indifference and partly because of foreign invasion, those who preserved this ethos paid a heavy price," says Mohan Bhagwat

title: Access to generic Risdiplam sought under policy for rare diseases for people with Spinal Muscular Atrophy
description: The recent availability of India-manufactured generic Risdiplam offers a practical pathway, patients write in an appeal to the PM; access to treatment is time sensitive, with delays having the potential to cause irreversible deterioration in the life-limiting neuromuscular condition

title: At least 9 dead in fire at residential complex in Vivek Vihar, several injured
Four women teachers killed after tree falls on moving car in Kullu
IPL playoff qualification scenarios: Time is running out for Mumbai Indians
description: The Mumbai Indians' dreams of IPL 2026 playoff qualification are hanging by a thread following an emphatic eight-wicket defeat to the Chennai Super Kings. The alarming trend of middle-order collapses, most recently in the battle against CSK, has been the story of MI this IPL 2026, and that has now propelled the 5-time champions into a do-or-die situation.

title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: 3-tier security, QR-based entry system for Tamil Nadu vote counting, says CEO
description: The repolling across the 15 polling booths in the South 24 Paraganas district concluded with a voter turnout of nearly 90%

title: India must bring tribal communities into mainstream of development: RSS chief
'Dhurandhar 2' BO collection day 45: Ranveer Singh’s film eyes Rs 1790 cr globally
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' continues its phenomenal run, crossing Rs 1,138.54 crore in India net collections after 45 days. The film's 7th Saturday saw a significant surge, earning Rs 2.40 crore, pushing its gross worldwide total to Rs 1,788.32 crore. This success comes despite new releases, proving its enduring appeal.

Israel-Iran war LIVE: President Trump says he is reviewing new Iranian proposal to end war
description: Mr. Trump say he was “not satisfied” with Iran's latest proposal in negotiations to end the war between the countries, rejecting the plan almost as soon as it was delivered.

title: Pulled off train in January, Kuldeep Kumar breaks pole vault record five months later
description: Kuldeep Kumar shattered the national pole vault record, clearing 5.41m in Bhubaneswar, months after he and a teammate were controversially removed from a train for carrying their poles. The 21-year-old's impressive performance, a personal best and his first indoor competition, surpassed the previous mark set by Dev Kumar Meena. Both athletes are now focused on future major events.

title: Law student says barred from exams despite medical condition, HC issues notice to institute
Tricity braces for thunderstorms, rain as temperatures likely to dip over next 48 hours

title: Results declared a day before NEET leave many aspirants in Mumbai anxious
What we know about US troop cuts in Germany as Trump signals deeper withdrawal
9 killed in residential building fire in Delhi’s Shahdara; AC blast suspected
description: Tragedy struck Shahdara early Sunday as a devastating fire ripped through a residential building, claiming at least nine lives. Firefighters battled the inferno for hours after a distress call at 3:27 am. While preliminary reports point to a short circuit, the exact cause remains under investigation. Many were hospitalized following the harrowing incident.

title: NEET UG 2026 Live Updates: Medical entrance exam today; things to carry
Nalini Malani’s Venice inquiry into power and violence
description: In her new work at the Venice Biennale, artist Nalini Malini examines the patriarchal order in which violence against women is legitimised

title: CSK youngster recreates Dhoni's 'gunshot' celebration vs Mumbai Indians
description: Young Kartik Sharma channelled MS Dhoni's iconic celebration after hitting the winning runs for Chennai Super Kings against Mumbai Indians.  Sharma's unbeaten 54 secured an eight-wicket victory for CSK. He revealed the planned gesture was for his first IPL fifty, a milestone he achieved with a composed knock. The win propelled CSK up the standings.

title: As Suryakumar Yadav is dismissed by a pacer for seventh time this IPL, Mahela Jayawardene gives his verdict
'Ten lifetimes won't be enough': TMC dares BJP to contest from Falta after repolling announced
description: TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee challenged the BJP and Election Commission to contest from Falta after a repoll was announced due to "severe electoral offences." The Election Commission cited widespread tampering of EVMs and compromised integrity of recorded votes at multiple booths, leading to the decision for a fresh poll on May 21.

title: Israel-Iran war highlights: Trump casts doubt on new peace proposal
description: Trump said he will review the plan that Iran has sent

title: Germany focuses on shared interests after U.S. announces troop drawdown

title: Stuck for over an hour, no response from police, says woman who confronted Maharashtra Minister for traffic jam
description: Teena Choudhry, the woman who confronted Maharashtra Minister Girish Mahajan over a traffic jam, has released an account of the incident, saying said she was stuck near Mahindra Taaz for more than an hour and received no response from police officers

title: Stephen Fleming on Impact Player usage: We will get some headlines around Akeal Hosein
After over 20K layoffs, how Oracle's 'promise' to Sam Altman is hurting banks across US
description: Oracle faces a significant bank-debt challenge due to its massive data centre expansion for OpenAI, reportedly requiring $300 billion. Lenders struggle with exposure limits, impacting their ability to finance these projects.  This comes as Oracle also plans substantial job cuts, highlighting financial pressures despite efforts to secure funding.

title: Social security measures for construction workers soon, says A.P. Minister
description: Proposals have been submitted for a 500-bed secondary hospital and a 150-bed superspecialty ESIC medical college in Amaravati, says Subhash

description: The Rajya Sabha MP, who was one of the close confidants of Kejriwal, now says the ‘toxic work culture’ of AAP forced him to quit the party and join the BJP

title: 'Pehle Rohit bhai, phir Dhoni bhai ... ': Surya reveals story behind iconic pic
description: Suryakumar Yadav shared an iconic photo with Rohit Sharma and MS Dhoni, sparking fan excitement and a unique "CUP-TAANS" suggestion from the BCCI. Yadav described the moment as a dream come true, reflecting on leading India to a T20 World Cup victory in 2026, a feat previously achieved by Dhoni and Sharma.

title: Court denies bail to woman accused in TCS Nashik case
description: The accused is now likely to appeal against the decision in the Bombay High Court. Four others arrested in the case have been remanded to police custody till May 5

title: ECI announces repolling for Falta Assembly seat in West Bengal on May 21
description: In a notification, the ECI says multiple complaints of electoral malpractices were received on the day of polling in the constituency. The votes will be counted on May 24

description: Congress hails the top court’s decision and notes that law stands above all

'If they misbehave…': Trump warns of fresh strikes, says he wants to 'eliminate' Iran's missile capability
description: President Trump has indicated fresh military strikes against Iran are possible if Tehran "misbehaves," even as he reviews a new 14-point peace proposal. The US leader expressed doubt about the plan's acceptability, stating Iran hasn't paid a sufficient price for its past actions. Iran's proposal seeks a regional conflict resolution within 30 days.

description: Vihaan undertook the expedition with a social message, carrying a banner urging youth to ‘Say No to Drugs’

'Raja Shivaji' BO day 2 (Hindi): Riteish's film earns Rs 3.40 crore, total crosses Rs 21 crore
description: Riteish Deshmukh's labor of love, 'Raja Shivaji,' has struck a chord with film enthusiasts, portraying the iconic Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. The film’s Marathi iteration has stormed the box office, while its Hindi counterpart is also seeing success. Despite competition from Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla', and the Hollywood releases - 'Michael' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2', the Riteish Deshmukh starrer is dominating the box office. Read on to know more.

title: Arvid Lindblad interview: Playing cricket at Mumbai maidans, Indian roots, F1 journey
description: Arvid Lindblad made an impressive Formula One debut with a points finish but also revealed a strong connection to India and cricket. During his Mumbai visit, he played street cricket at maidans linked to Sachin Tendulkar and said he might have pursued the sport if not racing, highlighting his Indian roots and sporting versatility beyond F1.

description: In emergency situations where questioning is necessary at night, the presence of a woman police officer is mandatory

title: When Speaker’s role in defection cases was tested in 1993
Tavleen Singh writes: Hate speech cannot go unpunished
Phone sirens startle millions as government rolls out real-time warning system
description: A nationwide test of a new cell broadcast disaster warning system caused widespread confusion and alarm across India Saturday morning.  Phones blared "Extremely Severe Alert" messages, startling commuters, theatre-goers, and patients. While intended to test reach and speed, the drill highlighted the need for clearer communication about such vital emergency alerts.

title: Nearly a decade after demonetisation seized his Rs 2 lakh, how a Pune contractor finally won it back
‘India tried to confuse us… It means we are scaring big teams’ – Frenchman Lanier after Thomas Cup win over India

Trump shares bizarre AI-generated image of himself lounging in Lincoln Memorial reflecting pool with Cabinet members
30-year-old judge found dead at Delhi home
description: On Saturday, a somber shadow fell over South Delhi as 30-year-old Aman Sharma, a dedicated judge and secretary of the District Legal Services Authority, took his own life at his home. Family alarms raised, prompting police intervention; emergency teams had to force entry into his locked bathroom to determine his condition.

title: 'Raja Shivaji' collection day 2: Riteish Deshmukh’s epic saga crosses Rs 15cr mark
description: Riteish Deshmukh's historical drama 'Raja Shivaji' has achieved a record-breaking opening in Marathi, earning over Rs 15 crore in its first two days. The Hindi version also performed decently, pushing the combined India net collection to Rs 21.90 crore. The film is on track to reach Rs 30 crore by the end of its opening weekend.

title: IPL 2026 Points Table Today: CSK vs MI Update Orange & Purple Cap, Runs and Wickets List
‘Not yet paid a big enough price’: Trump sceptical as Iran submits 14-point plan to end war
description: US President Trump is reviewing a new Iranian proposal for a comprehensive peace framework, but expressed significant doubt about its acceptance. He believes Iran hasn't sufficiently "paid a price" for past actions. The plan reportedly seeks security guarantees, withdrawal of US forces, and sanctions relief. Trump remains cautious, hinting at potential military action if necessary.

title: Expressways, industrial parks, logistic hubs be expedited in mission mode: Yogi at STC meet
India goes down 0-3 to France in the Thomas Cup semifinals, settle for bronze
description: The absence of Lakshya Sen proved costly as HS Prannoy joined Ayush Shetty and Kidambi Srikanth in defeat, losing 19-21, 16-21 to world No. 17 Toma Junior Popov, as India failed to win a single game in a completely one-sided contest

title: Don’t leave counting centres till process over: Mamata, Abhishek brief TMC agents
India’s two youths: From unemployed graduates to credit score chasers
Bagri dam tragedy: 3 of family return Delhi from Madhya Pradesh's Jabalpur in coffins
description: What began as a picturesque family getaway at Madhya Pradesh's Bargi dam quickly turned into a heartbreaking disaster. A tragic cruise boat capsized, pulling three innocent lives into its depths: Marina Massey, her beloved mother Madhur, and her young son Trishaan, just four years old.

title: Bishnupur violence: 25 days after attack, family claims bodies of 2 minors killed in blast
'In uniform you are in service': Motorist who took on minister in traffic jam tells her story
description: Teena Choudhary, a Worli resident, revealed her identity after confronting minister Girish Mahajan during a reservation agitation traffic jam. She explained her frustration at being stuck for 90 minutes while trying to pick up her daughter. Choudhary praised Mahajan for listening and resolving the issue, while urging political parties to address public apathy.

title: ED summons TMC heavyweight candidates again on May 6 for questioning in civic body recruitment scam
Trump says he is reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war
‘You are just fighting among yourselves’: Babar Azam hits out at 90s Pakistan cricketers
description: Pakistan cricket faces internal strife post-T20 World Cup exit. Player Shadab Khan's spat with former stars Shahid Afridi and Mohammad Yousuf over criticism highlighted a growing divide. Captain Babar Azam has now called for mutual respect, acknowledging players' right to defend themselves against personal attacks while urging support for the national team.

title: 12.38 lakh tonnes paddy purchased from 1.54 lakh ryots so far, ₹1,129 crore paid
description: According to Commissioner of Civil Supplies M. Stephen Ravindra, the department is operating at full capacity across the State to handle the inflow of paddy

title: Great Nicobar project key for India’s military footprint, its opposition will benefit China
description: Defence veterans, including former IAF chief R K S Bhadauria, strongly back the Greater Nicobar project, deeming it vital for India's national security and military presence. They argue it enhances surveillance of the Malacca Strait, crucial for checking China's growing influence in the Indian Ocean. The project is seen as a strategic and economic win.

title: Aboard first Srinagar-Jammu train: Soldier expecting child, family that skipped the road
Army starts process to procure modern bullet-proof troop carriers for Rashtriya Rifles
description: The Indian Army is set to acquire 159 bullet-proof troop carriers for its Rashtriya Rifles battalions operating in Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh. These vehicles will enhance protected mobility in challenging terrains, supporting counter-insurgency operations with improved troop transportation and protection. The procurement aligns with the 'Make in India' initiative, aiming for domestic production.

title: Top 500 companies’ profits grew 30% post Covid, but no investments: CEA
Shanti law in, US nuclear ‘mission’ on its way to tap new tie-ups
Poll results tomorrow, one Bengal seat to vote again later
Govt tests new system for real-time alerts on disasters, emergencies
Delhi CM directs officials to act swiftly on public grievances
description: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta said feedback received during these interactions plays a crucial role in shaping policies and making government schemes more people-centric

title: CBI arrests 2 for Rs 2,700 crore fraud after extradition from UAE
description: India successfully repatriated two fugitives, Kamlesh Parekh and Aalok Kumar, from the UAE. Parekh, involved in a Rs 2,672 crore banking fraud, was brought to Kolkata. Kumar, a key figure in a passport forgery racket, was handed over to Haryana police in Mumbai. Both were apprehended following Interpol Red Notices.

title: 11 dead in MP boat tragedy: Warnings ignored; cruise sailed in 50km/h winds, ended in sinking
description: The death toll in the Bargi dam cruise disaster has risen to 11 after two more children's bodies were recovered. The cruise reportedly launched despite wind warnings exceeding safety limits, contrasting with stricter practices elsewhere. Search operations continue for four missing passengers.

title: Akhilesh Yadav takes jibe on Uttar Pradesh Deputy CMs, duo hit back
description: SP chief Akhilesh Yadav took a swipe at Uttar Pradesh Deputy CMs following their public appearance together

title: Panel visits Rajasthan town for probe into clash between BJP MLA, officials
description: Senior IAS officer Ravi Jain said that the committee would submit a detailed report to Chief Minister Bhajan Lal Sharma

title: Rohit Jain appointed as RBI deputy governor
description: Rohit Jain, an executive director with three decades of experience at the Reserve Bank of India, has been appointed as Deputy Governor. His three-year term begins on or after May 3, 2026, succeeding T Rabi Sankar. Jain, who previously oversaw banking supervision, joins SC Murmu as an internal promotion to the DG post, with departments likely to be reshuffled.

title: Sudesh Kumar, hero of ‘Saranga’ and producer of ‘Uljhan’, passes away
description: Veteran actor and producer Sudesh Kumar, known for his roles in 'Saranga' and 'Chhoti Bahen', passed away at 95 in Mumbai. Kumar, who also produced thrillers like 'Uljhan', began his career in theatre before making a mark in films. His wife confirmed his passing after a brief illness. He was born in Peshawar and later moved to Bombay.

title: Decision-making remains with managers in organisations though AI adoption is on the rise, say experts
description: Experts discuss how managerial roles are evolving quickly as AI takes over multiple tasks in organisations, especially those in the technology space. They discuss challenges posed by AI and how managers can overcome those.

title: GT’s top-order batters always look to play proper cricket: Kapoor
description: PBKS assistant bowling coach Gonsalves brushes aside any concerns over his team conceding 200-plus totals frequently

title: West Bengal Elections: Exit polls for stock market, TMC to get 200+, says Didi
description: Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee dismissed exit poll predictions, asserting Trinamool's victory with over 200 seats and accusing the BJP of manipulating markets. She urged counting agents to remain vigilant and not panic over initial postal ballot results. Meanwhile, opposition leader Suvendu Adhikari called for peace and acceptance of the mandate, warning against post-poll violence.

title: Rahul Gandhi cites Gujarat BJP chief’s ‘indecent remarks’ against Geniben Thakor
description: Mr. Gandhi says the controversy exposes the BJP’s anti-women and Manuwadi mindset and questions the party’s commitment to empowering women

title: Indian-origin Meenu Batra released from ICE custody after months; living in US for 35 years
Power, politics and the chair: The hidden stories of seating in India
Ayush outplayed by Christo as India trail France 0-1 in Thomas Cup semifinals
description: Ayush Shetty struggled to match Christo Popov’s tactical control, going down 11-21, 9-21 in 39 minutes

title: Delhi court rejects bail plea of Al Falah University chairman in money laundering case
description: The ED opposed the bail, citing the gravity of allegations and the ongoing probe

title: In Gujarat, bouncers hired to watch screen addicts
description: Desperate parents in Gujarat are hiring bouncers to manage teenagers battling severe phone, gaming, and drug addictions.  These security personnel, costing up to Rs 65,000 monthly, are deployed 24/7 to prevent violence, substance abuse, and risky behavior, highlighting a growing trend of extreme de-addiction measures.

title: Two FIRs against defector MP Pathak? Punjab cops won’t say
description: Two FIRs, reportedly under non-bailable charges, have been filed against Rajya Sabha MP Sandeep Pathak in Punjab, shortly after he switched from AAP to BJP. Political leaders from BJP and SAD have decried the move as "political vendetta" and an attempt to intimidate party members. Security was heightened at Pathak's Delhi residence.

title: Election Commission releases final data: 4.88 crore people voted in Tamil Nadu
description: Tamil Nadu witnessed a record 85.1% voter turnout in the recent assembly elections, with 4.88 crore citizens casting their ballots. Women voters significantly outnumbered men, continuing a trend from previous years. The Election Commission faced delays in releasing data but assured robust security and transparency for the upcoming vote counting on May 4.

title: West Bengal elections: Ahead of counting, TMC & BJP spar over EVM security
description: Ahead of Bengal's vote counting, Trinamool and BJP traded accusations over EVM strongroom security. TMC alleged CCTV blackouts in North 24 Parganas, while BJP pointed to alleged unauthorized access and attempted breaches in Salt Lake and Burdwan. Both parties raised concerns about the integrity of the storage facilities.

title: Government notifies FDI changes on China funds
description: India has eased foreign investment rules, allowing up to 100% FDI in insurance and relaxing norms for investments from neighbouring countries. Companies with up to 10% Chinese holding can now invest via the automatic route, though entities registered in China itself are excluded. These changes aim to boost capital inflows amidst a weakening rupee.

title: Can relocating Pablo Escobar’s hippos to Anant Ambani’s Vantara solve Colombia’s problem?
description: Why are the hippos scheduled to be culled? Can Vantara house 80 hippos? Can wild animals be relocated to India?

title: What did the U.S. Supreme Court change in Louisiana?
description: Why did Louisiana redraw districts, creating a new Black-majority district? How did Louisiana’s situation bring two legal problems into direct collision? What did the Court decide about the Voting Rights Act? What are the implications and concerns?

title: Bargi dam tragedy: MP tourism launched cruise despite high-wind forecast
description: Tragedy struck at Bargi Dam as a cruise, reportedly launched despite severe wind warnings, claimed 11 lives, including children. Officials revealed forecasts predicted winds far exceeding safety limits for water sports. While other water activities in the state were suspended due to similar alerts, this operation proceeded, sparking criticism and allegations of neglect within the tourism department.

title: Why did the UAE quit OPEC and OPEC+?
description: What explains the years of simmering competition between Riyadh and Abu Dhabi? How will the UAE’s decision impact oil prices? How has its decision to leave impacted OPEC and OPEC+? Will this move benefit India and if so, how?

title: India successfully conducts 2nd test of long-range hypersonic anti-ship missile
description: India has successfully tested its long-range hypersonic anti-ship missile (LR-AShM), boasting a strike range exceeding 1,500 km and speeds of Mach 10. This advanced weapon, capable of evading modern defenses and engaging large targets, significantly enhances India's maritime capabilities. The successful flight test marks a major stride in indigenous defense innovation, bolstering national security and self-reliance.

title: All five Indian quartets fail to make it to final round in World Athletics Relays
description: They will still compete on the second day of the event on Sunday in an additional round for four slots for the 2027 World Athletics Championships

title: West Bengal polls: EC scraps Falta election, orders repolling on May 21
description: Bengal's electoral landscape has shifted as the Election Commission cancelled polling in Falta constituency due to widespread EVM tampering. A repoll is set for May 21, making it a unique post-result election. Allegations of threats against villagers and the arrest of a candidate's aides have heightened tensions, focusing attention on the remaining seats to decide the state's next government.

title: BFI tweaks assessment framework for selection
description: The BFI has switched from round robin to knockout format in sparring bouts, to select boxers for important events.

title: Gig workers struggle to stay afloat amid soaring temperatures
Ernakulam sees heavy inflow of suspected synthetic drugs
description: The spike follows a crackdown triggered by a raid at a star hotel at Kadavanthra in March, where eight professionals were arrested with suspected narcotic substances

Jaipur court grants divorce, cites wife’s social media conduct as ‘mental cruelty’
description: A Jaipur family court granted a man a divorce, citing his wife's objectionable social media activity as mental cruelty. The court ruled that sharing compromising photos online caused the husband significant emotional distress and damaged his reputation. This ruling underscores how online behavior can be crucial evidence in matrimonial disputes, leading to the dissolution of the decade-old marriage.

title: VCK to look into charge of weak campaigning in some constituencies
83.96% men, 86.2% women voted at polling stations in Assembly poll across Tamil Nadu: EC
description: A total of 4,87,98,833 voters out of 5,73,43,291 turned up to exercise their franchise on April 23 in T.N. Assembly polls; total votes polled may go up as the current figures do not include postal ballots or senior citizens who voted through Form 12D

title: IPL 2026: Clinical CSK completes double over MI
description: Kamboj and Noor excel as the hosts restrict the visitors to 159 for seven; Ruturaj and Kartik take them home; the Mumbai outfit stares at an early exit

title: FBI arrests 276 in global operation that targeted 'scam compounds' stealing millions
description: An unprecedented international effort involving the FBI, Dubai Police, and Chinese Ministry of Public Security has dismantled nine cryptocurrency investment fraud centers, leading to the arrest of 276 individuals. These operations targeted Americans, resulting in millions of dollars in losses. The crackdown highlights a global commitment to combating cross-border financial crime.

title: Rift widens within the Haryana BJP over its Rajya Sabha MP’s comments on former CM Bhajan Lal

West Bengal elections: Both central, state officers at counting centres, EC tells SC
description: The Supreme Court dismissed a Trinamool Congress plea challenging the Election Commission's deployment of counting staff. The EC assured the court that both central and state government employees would be assigned to counting tables to ensure balance, refuting claims of bias. The court accepted the EC's assurance and dismissed the petition.

title: Woman held for theft of valuables from student’s house
Sale of mangoes picks up in Salem, but traders worried as Iran war hits exports to Gulf nations
CMRL starts tunnelling at Villivakkam under railway tracks for Phase II project
description: Long-distance trains have reduced their speed to 20 kmph while crossing the Villivakkam railway station as a precautionary measure; TBM Marutham has been deployed for the work

Searle Scholars Programme Award given to SRM alumnus
IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians’ play-off hopes all but over after Gaikwad, Kartik fire CSK to emphatic win
Ruturaj Gaikwad masterclass sinks MI as CSK keep playoff hopes alive
description: Chennai Super Kings secured a vital eight-wicket victory over Mumbai Indians, bolstered by a disciplined bowling attack led by Noor Ahmad and Anshul Kamboj. Ruturaj Gaikwad's unbeaten 67 anchored the chase, with strong support from Kartik Sharma, ensuring CSK's playoff hopes remain alive while pushing MI further down the table.

title: HPBOSE Class 12th Result 2026 Date, Time: HP Board to declare result on May 4

21-yr-old UP woman burnt alive by lover, his kin; dies at Delhi hospital with 90% burns
description: A 21-year-old woman, Kashish Meena, tragically died after battling severe burn injuries for a week. She was allegedly set ablaze by her lover and his family following a relationship dispute. Police have registered a murder case against the accused, including the lover who has been arrested. An investigation is underway, with authorities also probing potential negligence by local police.

description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed his morning habits. He wakes early, reads news, and enjoys a vegetarian breakfast. Pichai is particular about his tea, describing it as very English. He exercises later in the day. Pichai also shared his favorite Indian dishes from Bengaluru, Delhi, and Mumbai. He enjoys Dosa, Chola Bhatura, and Pav Bhaji respectively.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ mints over Rs 1785 cr as ‘Raja Shivaji’ takes lead on Friday
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its steady box office run, grossing over Rs 1785 crore globally after 44 days. Despite facing new competition, including Riteish Deshmukh's 'Raja Shivaji' which took the lead on Friday, 'Dhurandhar 2' added Rs 1.05 crore on its 7th Friday, bringing its India net collection to Rs 1,136.14 crore.

title: Maria Sharapova net worth 2026: Grand Slam icon’s empire grows
description: Maria Sharapova, a tennis icon, amassed an estimated $180 million net worth primarily through lucrative endorsement deals and her candy brand, Sugarpova. Her remarkable career included winning all four Grand Slams and reaching world No. 1. After retiring in 2020, she continues to thrive in business and investments, maintaining her global recognition.
